meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve can't scale projects (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Master User Onboarding to Scale Your AI Projects
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with scaling. Learn how to implement expert-level user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to convert and retain your first users.
content.answer_block: Scaling issues often stem from high churn caused by poor onboarding. By implementing a structured, feature-gated onboarding flow, you guide users to their 'Aha!' moment faster. Use Antigravity to architect the flow and Claude Code to automate the implementation, ensuring your application handles growth with professional-grade user retention mechanics.
content.intro:
You have spent weeks grinding on your MVP, but your growth graph is flat. The code is clean, the AI model is sharp, yet users drop off within seconds of signing up. This is the 'death valley' of SaaS: you built a tool, but you failed to build a journey. Without a clear path to value, your project isn't just failing to scale—it's invisible to the user.

Today, we pivot. We are moving from 'coder' to 'product architect'. We will transform your friction-heavy interface into a high-conversion engine using automated onboarding sequences. You will learn to bridge the gap between technical complexity and user delight, turning your prototype into a scalable asset that keeps users coming back.

steps.title: Mapping the User Value Path
steps.description: Define the critical steps a user must take to realize value. We use Antigravity to map the state machine of the onboarding flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Product Architect. Map out a 4-step onboarding flow for an AI SaaS that guides a new user from signup to their first successful AI generation. Identify potential friction points.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Create a flowchart of the user onboarding state machine in mermaid.js format'

steps.title: Implementing Feature Gating
steps.description: Restrict access to advanced features until the onboarding steps are complete, ensuring users learn the basics first.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a middleware pattern for Next.js that checks if a user has completed the onboarding checklist before granting access to premium AI endpoints.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement a middleware.ts file that redirects un-onboarded users to the /onboarding route'

steps.title: Automating Tooltips with Context
steps.description: Inject contextual help that triggers only when the user interacts with specific UI elements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a React hook useOnboardingTour that tracks user interaction with elements and triggers contextual tooltips based on a provided configuration array.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a custom useOnboardingTour hook and a Tour component in components/ui/'

steps.title: Progress Tracking Persistence
steps.description: Sync onboarding progress to your database so users can resume their journey across sessions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a Prisma schema for an OnboardingProgress table that stores completed steps and timestamps for a user session.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Update schema.prisma with an OnboardingProgress model and generate migrations'

steps.title: Triggering the First Conversion
steps.description: Use an AI-generated personalized message to celebrate the completion of the onboarding flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a server-side action that triggers an email or notification once the user completes all onboarding steps, congratulating them and offering a trial upgrade.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a server action in lib/actions.ts to handle onboarding completion events'

pro_tips: Never force a sign-up before the user experiences the core utility of your AI tool.
Use 'Empty States' as educational tools; if there is no data, provide a 'Click here to generate your first X' button.
Implement 'Progress Bars' in your onboarding; the Zeigarnik effect proves people are psychologically driven to complete incomplete tasks.
Automate the collection of user feedback immediately after the onboarding flow to identify where they felt confused.
Keep your onboarding flow under 90 seconds. If it takes longer, break it into smaller, asynchronous milestones.
content.next_steps: Deploy your updated onboarding flow to a staging environment and use tools like PostHog or Mixpanel to track the conversion rate of your new users compared to your previous baseline.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to turn casual visitors into power users. This is how you build a product that scales itself through retention. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
